events.statement: Holo3-35B scores 80.4 on the GUI grounding benchmark
Independent rerun puts Holo3-35B at 77.8, not 80.4
Agent S3 improves 62.6 to 69.9 on OSWorld with bBoN

C01_holo3_grounding.statement: Holo3-35B grounding accuracy is contested between 80.4 and 77.8

C02_agents3_osworld.statement: Agent S3 reaches 69.9 on OSWorld using bBoN rollout diversity

falsifiers.statement: If no independent source reproduces 80.4, the claim is unverified
